candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Based on Coulomb's law and the information in the table above, which of the following anions is most likely to have the strongest interactions with nearby water molecules in an aqueous solution?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
基于库仑定律和下表中的离子半径和电荷数据,在水溶液中,哪种阴离子与周围水分子之间最可能存在最强的静电引力相互作用?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
离子 & 半径 ($\mathrm{pm}$) & 电荷数 \\
\hline
$\mathrm{F^-}$ & 133 & -1 \\
$\mathrm{Cl^-}$ & 181 & -1 \\
$\mathrm{Br^-}$ & 196 & -1 \\
$\mathrm{I^-}$ & 220 & -1 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
